data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — implicit_assumption): Script CLI interface must be explicitly defined: inputs are (1) reviewer-findings.json path and (2) task ticket ID. Script resolves the task's file impact by running ticket show and parsing the ## File Impact section (similar to issue-quality-check.sh awk pattern). Also: findings with empty/missing file paths must be silently ignored (not treated as out-of-scope).
